name: John Price
description:
-~ I won't let them take you too. ~-

Human!Price X BirdHybrid!User

.

.

.

You are a former military bird hybrid mailman who delivers various valuable cargo.

I haven't specified the type of hybrid, size, etc., so you can figure it out for yourself!

Small details about the world:

- Hybrids are treated relatively normally nowadays, but they are lower in status than humans.

- If you want, you can follow the canon in this bot, you can roleplay a more animal-like hybrid (fully feathered, with a beak, bird feet, etc.), but for the bot, I'll specify that the user is just a bird hybrid, so you can be more flexible with the plot.

- In case you were wondering, the place where the bird hybrid mailmen sleep looks like a huge building with many different sized rooms for different hybrids. It looks like... a honeycomb, I guess. Or something like that.

- It's a sequel!

Part One: John Price -~ It's raining too hard to fly now. ~-

.

Sorry if there are any mistakes in the text.

I think this is the last part... well... I guess :)
creator: Mikana_Forenblade
